snapshots.name: 浏览页 — 默认状态
snapshots.purpose: Review full-screen photo viewer with top progress counter, right action bar, bottom progress line and photo metadata.

snapshots.name: 浏览页 — 中途进度
snapshots.purpose: Review progress counter and progress bar at mid-point with some photos liked and one deleted.

snapshots.name: 归档底部弹出层
snapshots.purpose: Review archive bottom sheet overlay with folder list and new folder option, sliding up over the photo.

snapshots.name: 喜欢页 — 有照片
snapshots.purpose: Review 2-column grid layout with red heart badges on each liked photo thumbnail.

snapshots.name: 喜欢页 — 空状态
snapshots.purpose: Review empty state message and hint text when no photos have been liked yet.

snapshots.name: 文件夹页 — 预填充
snapshots.purpose: Review folder card list with thumbnail strips, photo counts, and the new folder button.

snapshots.name: 浏览页 — 全部已删除
snapshots.purpose: Review end-of-queue state when all photos have been deleted, showing completed message.

snapshots.name: 浏览页 — 删除确认中
snapshots.purpose: Review delete button in pending-confirm state: red background, white trash icon, label shows '确认?', pulse animation active. Second tap within 2.5s confirms deletion.
snapshots.reviewNote: deleteConfirmPending is local useState, not in Zustand store — this snapshot shows the baseline browse state; the confirm state is rendered by local component state.
